title: Assembly election 2026 live: Amit Shah says BJP will enforce UCC in Bengal, ban four marriages in 'certain community'
description: Assembly Elections 2026 Live Updates: Abhishek Banerjee slammed the BJP for “failing” on promises, saying Lakshmir Bhandar will continue in West Bengal. Mallikarjun Kharge hailed the delimitation bill’s defeat, accusing BJP of a “dangerous game.”
